recommendations.title: Kaithi
recommendations.overview: Dilli, a convicted criminal, is out on parole to meet his daughter. However, a drug bust sets him off on a mission to save the life of police officers.

recommendations.title: Leo
recommendations.overview: Parthiban, a cafe owner, lives with his family in Himachal Pradesh. Things take an absurd turn for him when he gets in the way of a drug cartel.

recommendations.title: Vikram
recommendations.overview: Amar is assigned to investigate a case of serial killings. When Amar investigates the case, he realizes it is not what it seems to be and following down this path will lead to nothing but war between everyone involved.

recommendations.title: Lethal Weapon 2
recommendations.overview: Riggs and Murtaugh are on the trail of South African diplomats using their immunity to engage in criminal activities.

recommendations.title: Run Hide Fight
recommendations.overview: A 17-year-old girl uses her wits, survival skills, and compassion to fight for her life, and those of her fellow classmates, against a group of live-streaming school shooters.

recommendations.title: Made in Britain
recommendations.overview: After being sent to a detention centre, a teenage skinhead clashes with the social workers who want to conform him to the status quo.

recommendations.title: Nightmare Alley
recommendations.overview: A roustabout joins a traveling carny and schemes to figure out the mind-reading act of Mademoiselle Zeena and her alcoholic husband.

recommendations.title: Crows Zero
recommendations.overview: The students of Suzuran High compete for the King of School title. An ex-graduate yakuza is sent to kill the son of a criminal group, but he can't make himself do it as he reminds him of his youth.

recommendations.title: Vikram Vedha
recommendations.overview: A notorious gangster Vedha surrenders himself to encounter specialist Vikram whom he challenges every step of the way by narrating his life events in the form of riddles that needs to be solved in order to capture him.

recommendations.title: Violent Cop
recommendations.overview: A detective breaks all rules of ethical conduct while investigating a colleague’s involvement in drug pushing and Yakuza activities.
